title: Masilamaniswara Temple, Thirumullaivoyal
tagline: Masilamaniswara Temple, Thirumullaivoyal — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Masilamaniswara Temple, Thirumullaivoyal or Masilamaniswara Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirumullaivoyal in the Chennai-Avadi road, India.
overview.description: The Masilamaniswara Temple, Thirumullaivoyal or Masilamaniswara Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirumullaivoyal in the Chennai-Avadi road, India. The temple is incarnated by the hymns of Tevaram and is classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam. The temple is incarnated by the hymns of Sundarar, Ramalinga Swamigal and Arunagirinathar. His consort Parvati is depicted as Piraisoodi Amman.

topPlaces.name: Paruthipattu Lake
topPlaces.description: Paruthipattu Lake, also known as Avadi Lake, is a lake in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located in the Avadi locality of Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Avadi taluk
topPlaces.description: Avadi taluk is a taluk, or township, of Tiruvallur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The administrative center of the township is Avadi, a neighbourhood of Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Annanur
topPlaces.description: Annanur is a western neighbourhood of Chennai, India. It is located near Ambattur and lies in Tiruvallur District.

topPlaces.name: Ayappakkam
topPlaces.description: Ayappakkam is a Western suburb of Chennai in Thiruvallur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Ayapakkam is currently a village panchayat surrounded by Thiruverkadu municipality, Avadi corporation and Greater Chennai Corporations.

topPlaces.name: Avadi
topPlaces.description: Avadi (Tamil: [aːʋaɖi]) is a City in Chennai metropolitan area, Thiruvallur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Its the headquarters of Avadi City Police, Avadi City Corporation and Avadi Taluk located within the Thiruvallur district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Thirumullaivoyal
topPlaces.description: Thirumullaivoyal is a western neighbourhood of Chennai the capital of the India state of Tamil Nadu, under Avadi City Municipal Corporation Limits. It is located in the Chennai Metropolitan Area in Thiruvallur district, 3 km (1.9 mi) from Avadi and 3 km (1.9 mi) from Ambattur O.T Bus depot.

topPlaces.name: Ayanambakkam Lake
topPlaces.description: Mel Ayanambakkam Lake is one of the clean water lake in Chennai district's locality Mel Ayanambakkam near Thiruverkadu. It is a lake spread over 210 acres (85 ha).

topPlaces.name: Ambattur Lake
topPlaces.description: Ambattur Aeri, or Ambattur Lake, is a rain-fed reservoir which reaches top levels during the monsoon seasons. In November 2008, incessant monsoon rain filled the lake and encroachments on the north and south banks of the lake were demolished.

items.note: Paruthipattu Lake, also known as Avadi Lake, is a lake in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located in the Avadi locality of Chennai.
Avadi taluk is a taluk, or township, of Tiruvallur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The administrative center of the township is Avadi, a neighbourhood of Chennai.
Annanur is a western neighbourhood of Chennai, India. It is located near Ambattur and lies in Tiruvallur District.

Ayappakkam is a Western suburb of Chennai in Thiruvallur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Ayapakkam is currently a village panchayat surrounded by Thiruverkadu municipality, Avadi corporation and Greater Chennai Corporations.

Avadi (Tamil: [aːʋaɖi]) is a City in Chennai metropolitan area, Thiruvallur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Its the headquarters of Avadi City Police, Avadi City Corporation and Avadi Taluk located within the Thiruvallur district of Tamil Nadu, India.

Thirumullaivoyal is a western neighbourhood of Chennai the capital of the India state of Tamil Nadu, under Avadi City Municipal Corporation Limits. It is located in the Chennai Metropolitan Area in Thiruvallur district, 3 km (1.9 mi) from Avadi and 3 km (1.9 mi) from Ambattur O.T Bus depot.
Mel Ayanambakkam Lake is one of the clean water lake in Chennai district's locality Mel Ayanambakkam near Thiruverkadu. It is a lake spread over 210 acres (85 ha).

Ambattur Aeri, or Ambattur Lake, is a rain-fed reservoir which reaches top levels during the monsoon seasons. In November 2008, incessant monsoon rain filled the lake and encroachments on the north and south banks of the lake were demolished.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Masilamaniswara Temple, Thirumullaivoyal?
faq.a: The best time to visit Masilamaniswara Temple, Thirumullaivoyal is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Masilamaniswara Temple, Thirumullaivoyal?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (15 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (18 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Masilamaniswara Temple, Thirumullaivoyal?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Masilamaniswara Temple, Thirumullaivoyal at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Masilamaniswara Temple, Thirumullaivoyal?
faq.a: Stays in Masilamaniswara Temple, Thirumullaivoyal start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Masilamaniswara Temple, Thirumullaivoyal?
faq.a: The top attractions are Paruthipattu Lake, Avadi taluk, Annanur, Ayappakkam, Avadi.
